name: Mexican Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces cream cheese (regular, lite, or fat-free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese in a bowl for 15 minutes.
2. Spread the softened cream cheese on the tortillas.
3. Arrange the remaining ingredients on top of the cream cheese.
4. Roll up the tortillas tightly and wrap them in plastic wrap.
5. Place the wrapped pinwheels in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
6. Cut into 3/4-inch slices before serving.
